hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.java|*.xml|*.kt|*.properties) if command -v iconv > /dev/null 2>&1; then iconv -f UTF-8 -t ISO-8859-1//TRANSLIT "$FILE" -o "$FILE.tmp" && mv "$FILE.tmp" "$FILE"; else python3 -c "import sys; p=sys.argv[1]; c=open(p,'r',encoding='utf-8',errors='ignore').read(); open(p,'w',encoding='iso-8859-1',errors='replace').write(c)" "$FILE"; fi ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true
